title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event
text: Campus tour 6 November Event Status: Completed Date & Time: November 06, 2025 3:00 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Book now Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first-hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
summary: This page details a completed campus tour held at University of Southampton Delhi on November 6, 2025, offering prospective students a chance to explore facilities and campus life.
